title: PFVM Power Down Scoped Drill Proposal

source.uri: rcas/PFVM Power down Scoped Drill Proposal.docx

guardrails.rule: Power-down drills require DRI sign-off and approved change management ticket before execution
Ensure soft-delete or snapshot backup is completed for all in-scope PFVM nodes before initiating power-down sequence

content.text: PFVM Power Down Scoped Drill Proposal (April 2026). Scoped drill proposal for PFVM (PilotFish Virtual Machine) power-down recovery scenario. Covers proposed steps for testing PFVM power-down fault injection and recovery within a defined scope, including pre-drill checklist, fault injection approach, PFVM recovery sequence, and validation criteria. The drill is designed to validate recovery procedures for a controlled power-down event affecting PFVM nodes. Authored by Hope Oluwalolope; last saved by Banreet Kaur. Document spans 10 pages (~2060 words). NOTE: Source document is MIP-protected (Confidential – Internal Only); all structured fields are derived from document filename, OLE metadata, and MIP label data as the ciphertext is inaccessible without tenant credentials.
